# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  parameters {
    string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: 'http://example.com/artifact.war', description: 'URL of the build artifact to download')
    string(name: 'PROD_SERVER', defaultValue: 'prod.example.com', description: 'The production server to deploy to')
  }

  stages {
    stage('Download Artifact') {
      steps {
        sh "wget -O artifact.war ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production Server') {
      steps {
        sshagent(['prod-deploy-key']) {
          sh "scp artifact.war ${params.PROD_SERVER}:/opt/prod-app"
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Restart Application') {
      steps {
        sshagent(['prod-deploy-key']) {
          sh "ssh ${params.PROD_SERVER} 'service prod-app restart'"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
